title: AGNI Telemetry Events
description: Append-only log of lesson-completion events. Each event records a student's mastery outcome, step-level detail, and skills exercised.

events.description: Chronological list of lesson-completion telemetry events.

mastery.description: Computed mastery score for this attempt (0.0–1.0).

steps.description: Per-step outcome details from the lesson player.

attempts.description: Number of attempts on this step.

durationMs.description: Time spent on this step in milliseconds.

skillsProvided.description: Skills exercised by completing this lesson (from ontology.provides).

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the lesson was completed.
